localizations.title: The Adventurers of Oz
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Have you looked closely at the center of the tornado?
localizations.code_2143: The palace opens its gate to you. But the powerful Oz only gives brief audiences...
localizations.code_3412: The palace opens its gate to you. But the powerful Oz only gives brief audiences...
localizations.code_3467: The guards allow themselves to be convinced and let you pass. Time has come to face the witch!
localizations.code_2895: You find an interesting excerpt in a Grimoire. Take this card in the deck put aside.
localizations.code_6887: All was an illusion! Instead of Oz, you find an old man behind a screen.
localizations.code_1111: As if by magic, you are back in Kansas! Maybe all of this was nothing but a dream?
localizations.code_1939: You're back in Kansas! But you will never forget your friends and this extraordinary adventure!
localizations.code_2148: The palace opens its gate to you. But the powerful Oz only gives brief audiences...
localizations.code_8412: The palace opens its gate to you. But the powerful Oz only gives brief audiences...
localizations.code_8472: The palace opens its gate to you. But the powerful Oz only gives brief audiences...
localizations.code_2748: The palace opens its gate to you. But the powerful Oz only gives brief audiences...
localizations.code_3472: The palace opens its gate to you. But the powerful Oz only gives brief audiences...
localizations.code_2743: The palace opens its gate to you. But the powerful Oz only gives brief audiences...
localizations.code_4095: You find an interesting excerpt in a GRIMOIRE. Take this card in the deck put aside.
localizations.code_2083: You find an interesting excerpt in a GRIMOIRE. Take this card in the deck put aside.
localizations.code_6857: All was an illusion! Instead of Oz, you find an old man behind a screen.
localizations.code_1469: HIS right is YOUR left and vice-versa.
localizations.code_9099: You find an interesting excerpt in a GRIMOIRE. Take this card in the deck put aside.
localizations.code_7383: You find an interesting excerpt in a GRIMOIRE. Take this card in the deck put aside.
localizations.code_6435: You find an interesting excerpt in a GRIMOIRE. Take this card in the deck put aside.
localizations.code_6038: You find an interesting excerpt in a GRIMOIRE. Take this card in the deck put aside.
localizations.hint_108: On all 6 backs of the medals, only one color is missing on each slot. For the jewel on the top, it's the green color.
localizations.hint_180: The numbers of the medals and adventurers form the desired shape.
localizations.hint_188: Once the 6 medals are found and assembled, follow the "?" to find a card number.
localizations.hint_0: The succession of symbols allows you to travel all together through the land of Oz. But first you need to find the starting point...
localizations.hint_1: Don't you see anything in the eye of the tornado?
localizations.hint_7_first: The colors on the floor remind you of one of the mirrors on the back of the cards.
localizations.hint_7: Find the only mirror with: red, then purple, then yellow, then green, then blue.
localizations.hint_8: The succession of symbols allows you to travel all together in the land of Oz. But first you need to find the starting point...
localizations.hint_9_first: The wall-eyes of this face seem to be quite strange, and so is this red dot.
localizations.hint_9: Place the mirror so as to match the colored markers: the edge of the mirror then points to one of the symbols.
localizations.hint_14: You will need a magic expert to understand how to use them.
localizations.hint_17_first: Yellow, green, blue, and red flowers… Don't these colors remind you of anything?
localizations.hint_17: Place the mirror so as to match the colored markers: the edge of the mirror then points to one of the symbols.
localizations.hint_20: Once you've found the 6 medals, you should be able to help the Scarecrow, the Lion, and the Tin Man.
localizations.hint_21: The crystal ball will show you the path once you've found the right means of transport. One color is a direction on the map of the Land of Oz.
localizations.hint_24_first: You will find the way to defeat the Witch in the kitchen.
localizations.hint_24: If the guard is to be trusted, the Witch strongly dislikes rainy days, so her weakness is…
localizations.hint_29: Which one of the companions will ask for the way, and to whom? Maybe all?
localizations.hint_31: Once you've found the 6 medals, you should be able to help the Scarecrow, the Lion, and the Tin Man.
localizations.hint_33: Once you've found the 6 medals, you should be able to help the Scarecrow, the Lion, and the Tin Man.
localizations.hint_39: The formula to use it has to be in the Witch's bookcase.
localizations.hint_44: You must very precisely overlay the mirror of the Witch of the North and the gate to find the four-digit code.
localizations.hint_45: The Tin Man indicates the starting point. Follow the symbols until you find a card number.
localizations.hint_52_first: Both stained glasses are overlaid on each other. Each stained glass will give you a number.
localizations.hint_52: When a strip is green, it has both yellow and blue. Reassemble the 2 numbers.
localizations.hint_53: You are sure you will use it. But probably at the very end.
localizations.hint_56: The Lion indicates the starting point. Follow the symbols until you find a card number.
localizations.hint_57_first: The guard is only waiting for your signal to help. Maybe you can bring him back something useful from the kitchen?
localizations.hint_57: Bring him something so that he can wash.
localizations.hint_59: Once you've found the 6 medals, you should be able to help the Scarecrow, the Lion, and the Tin Man.
localizations.hint_68: Once your friends have recovered, there should only be 4 more guards to defeat.
localizations.hint_69: Flip the NO ENTRY card over.
localizations.hint_70: The guard in the middle is the 5th. You will have to put in an ascending order the 4 numbers of the remaining guards.
localizations.hint_73: The different colors will lead you to Glinda. But first you have to find the correct means of transport.
localizations.hint_74_first: Each of the four apparitions will produce a digit of the code thanks to the Mirror of Truth.
localizations.hint_74: Place the mirror over the apparitions according to the colored markers. The edge of the mirror points to a symbol…
localizations.hint_76: Bring back from the kitchen the items that could help recondition your friends.
localizations.hint_77: Once you've found the 6 medals, you should be able to help the Scarecrow, the Lion, and the Tin Man.
localizations.hint_80: The succession of symbols allows you to travel all together through the land of Oz. But first you need to find the starting point...
localizations.hint_84: Unlimited resources are very useful to overcome ALL the challenges of this castle.
localizations.hint_86: The Scarecrow indicates the starting point. Follow the symbols until you find a card number.
localizations.hint_88: The succession of symbols allows you to travel all together through the land of Oz. But First you need to find the starting point…
localizations.hint_89_first: Green, yellow, blue, red: these colors remind you of something.
localizations.hint_89: Place the mirror over the colored areas according to their colors. The edge of the mirror points to a symbol…
localizations.hint_90: Welding is a first step, but something else in the kitchen should help unblocking the Tin Man's joints.
localizations.hint_93: The one on HIS left is the guard one step on the right for you.
localizations.hint_96: The guard on HIS right corresponds with the guard on the left for you.
localizations.hint_97_first: 4 balls of fire: a green, a yellow, a blue, and a red. These colors remind you of something.
localizations.hint_97: Place the mirror over the balls of fire according to the colored markers. The edge of the mirror points to a symbol…
localizations.hint_91_first: The mirror of the Witch of the North will help you pass through the gate.
localizations.hint_91: If you overlay the mirror of truth and this card, the 4 digits of the entry code shall appear. You'll only need to place them in the order of the rainbow.
localizations.hint_121: Repeat the cycle of the 3 trees until you draw a card number.
localizations.hint_111: You will obtain the formula if you read every other word on each side of the card.
localizations.hint_85_first: The mirror of truth should guide you through the books so as to find the code's 4 digits.
localizations.hint_85: Overlay the mirror and the card in FOUR different positions (including turning it over).
localizations.hint_87: Once you've found the 6 medals, you should be able to help the Scarecrow, the Lion, and the Tin Man.
localizations.hint_95: Solve the 3 optional quests to help your friends. Hints 108, 180, and 188 will provide additional information if needed.
localizations.machine_21: After a harsh fight, the winds finally push you in the right direction!
